channel.title: Posts on AntsTrader
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on AntsTrader

item.title: 2025 01 trade records & summary
item.description:
2025-01 Monthly Summary

The sum of sells with gain-only are +$18,674.32

The sum of sells with lost-only are -$0.00

The net gain, including Robinwoods(bitcoin), is +$18,677.33

Year-To-Month gain break down by month.

Monthly gain per stock, sorted by the gain in 2025-01

All trades are based on the trade style described in

How to Be a Happy Active Stock Trader

Beating S&P 500 by 30% in Year 2020 with ANTS

item.title: 2022 12 trade records & summary
item.description:
2022-12 Monthly Summary

Continued to sell with lose before the short-term lost becomes long-term, for the sake of tax saving.

The sum of sells with gain-only are $11,623.31

The sum of sells with lost-only are -$9192.00

The net gain, including Robinwoods(bitcoin), is -$2,431.31

I am trying to reduce the short-term gain in individual account, and get/convert more gains into my 401K and RothIRA accounts.

item.title: 2022 09 trade records & summary
item.description:
2022-09 Monthly Summary

Continued to sell with lose before the short-term lost becomes long-term, for the sake of tax saving.

The sum of sells with gain-only are $5,587.52

The sum of sells with lost-only are -$14,924.35

The net gain, including Robinwoods(bitcoin), is -$9,336.82

I am trying to reduce the short-term gain in individual account, and get/convert more gains into my 401K and RothIRA accounts.

item.title: 2022 08 trade records & summary
item.description:
2022-08 Monthly Summary

Continued to sell with lose before the short-term lost becomes long-term, for the sake of tax saving.

The sum of sells with gain-only are $10,159.94

The sum of sells with lost-only are -$7,240.00

The net gain, including Robinwoods(bitcoin), is $2,919.94

I am trying to reduce the short-term gain in individual account, and get/convert more gains into my 401K and RothIRA accounts.

item.title: 2022 07 trade records & summary
item.description:
2022-07 Monthly Summary

Started to sell with lose before the short-term lost becomes long-term, for the sake of tax saving.

The sum of sells with gain-only, including Robinwoods(bitcoin), are $8,058.42

The sum of sells with lost-only are -$5,017.68

The net gain, including Robinwoods(bitcoin), is $3,040.73

I am trying to reduce the short-term gain in individual account, and get/convert more gains into my 401K and RothIRA accounts.

item.title: 2022 06 trade records & summary
item.description:
2022-06 Monthly Summary

CHWY contributed $1069 in total.

All other short-term gains are around $7326

Year-To-Month gain, including Robinwoods(bitcoin), is $78,755.79

All trades are based on the trade style described in

How to Be a Happy Active Stock Trader

Beating S&P 500 by 30% in Year 2020 with ANTS

2022-06-30 Dow -0.82% Nasdaq -1.33% S&P 500 -0.88%

item.title: 2022 05 trade records & summary
item.description:
2022-05 Monthly Summary

OXYWS contributed $2072.05 in total.

All other short-term gains are around $6.213.79

Year-To-Month gain, including Robinwoods(bitcoin), is $69,448.06

Besides, BitCoin has the gain of $632.65, which is about 6.3% gain this year so far.

All trades are based on the trade style described in

How to Be a Happy Active Stock Trader
